description: Single-file Python project with two planted defects, hermetic run. First e2e for the Ultimate Python image (conda + node toolchain): proves qodana-python builds (base + conda + node + dist + cli + runtime), loads its Ultimate PyCharm Pro profile, and scans a real .py producing SARIF. Driver name + rule ids are NEEDS-PINNING starting guesses — pin from a CI control run and confirm both are enabled in THIS image's default PY (PyCharm Professional) profile.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: the planted `unused = 42` local that is never read must surface; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate PyCharm Pro profile.
STARTING-GUESS id: `Greeter.shout` never uses `self`, so a may-be-static inspection must report; pin the exact id from a CI control run and confirm it is in the Ultimate PyCharm Pro profile.
